title: DeskSetupCodePayloadV1
description: Decoded JSON payload inside a DESK- setup code (after Base64url decode). Wire format: DESK-<base64url(JSON)>.

v.description: Setup code format version. Breaking changes increment v.

secret.description: Full relay secret shown once in admin (relay_ prefix + random bytes).

api_url.description: Platform origin used for print queue API calls (no path).

desk_name.description: Human-readable desk label for relay UI.
